btx-precision.opportunity: BTX Precision scored 57 on opportunity with a perfect 100% fit—it can fully serve ITAR, build-to-print, and precision machining with no gaps. The account is being pulled in two directions: strong new demand from two government contract awards ($1.7M and $8.0M) plus a demand spike, set against elevated risk (94) from capacity constraints, repeated quality escapes, and two lost recompetes. This is a target where winning new work depends on relieving capacity and fixing quality before those pressures cost more contracts.
